title: wf shape descriptor
description: Describes a set of RDF triples that behave as a relational or tree-shaped table. One document, three coordinated uses: validate on write, define the sink schema, guide demotion. Serves as input to wf_profile (proposal), wf_validate, wf_materialize, wf_demote, wf_fetch.

name.description: Snake-case identifier used as the sink table/document name and as the descriptor's reference IRI-suffix in composition graphs.

shape.description: Shape family. Determines which materializer runs (attribute/foreign_key/child_table → wf_materialize_relational.wasm; tree → wf_materialize_tree.wasm; graph → do not demote).

anchor.description: How to identify subjects belonging to this shape.

class.description: rdf:type IRI; subject is anchored when { ?s a <class> } holds.

predicate_signature.description: Subject is anchored when it has non-empty values for every listed predicate. Used when no class assertion is available (open-world data, ad-hoc profiling output).

sink.description: Where to materialize. Examples: sqlite:///data/mv.db#person, duckdb:///data/mv.duckdb#person, postgres://host/db#schema.person, sirix://host/tree#category_tree. Absent = descriptor is metadata only (validation, profiling), not materialized.

demote.description: After successful materialization, DELETE the source triples for subjects confirmed in the sink. Only honored when sink is set. Off by default — demotion is a one-way door, opt-in.

refresh.description: When to re-run the materializer. Absent = manual only.

threshold_rows.description: Trigger materialization when the shape's row count reaches this many since the last run.

interval_seconds.description: Trigger materialization at least this often, regardless of row count.

provenance.description: Origin metadata. Set by wf_profile on generated descriptors; users may edit.

generator.description: Tool that produced this descriptor (e.g. "wf_profile@0.1.0"). Free-form; not enforced.

confidence.description: Profiler's confidence in the shape classification (0..1). Low = user should review before adopting.

sample_size.description: Number of subjects the profiler examined.

name.description: Snake-case column identifier used verbatim in the sink schema.

role.description: How this column relates to the anchor. Exactly one column per descriptor has role=subject_iri (the primary key). foreign_key targets a sibling shape; child_link/parent_link only appear on shape=tree descriptors.

predicate.description: RDF predicate that projects this column's values from the anchor subject. Absent only when role=subject_iri (the subject IRI itself is the value).

type.description: SQL-side type. Derived from the RDF datatype: xsd:string/*Literal → string; xsd:integer/int/long → integer; xsd:decimal/double/float → decimal; xsd:boolean → boolean; xsd:date → date; xsd:dateTime → datetime; IRI object → iri (rendered as CHAR/VARCHAR of the IRI text in most backends).

cardinality.description: Values per subject. 0..1/1 → scalar column (nullable / NOT NULL); 0..n/1..n → separate child table keyed by subject_iri.

target_shape.description: For role=foreign_key: name of the sibling shape descriptor whose subject_iri is referenced. Enables cross-shape planner rewriting.

constraint.description: Optional per-column constraint. All applied at validation time; the compatible subset (regex → CHECK, length → CHECK) is emitted as DDL by the materializer.

regex.description: ECMAScript regex; applied to string columns only.

max_length.description: Maximum string length. Emitted as VARCHAR(n) where the backend supports it.
